columns.Name: ENTITLEMENT_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID

columns.Name: ENTITLEMENT_NAME
columns.Comments: Identifies the entitlement name.

columns.Name: DEFAULT_ENTITLEMENT
columns.Comments: Defines whether it is a default entitlement.

columns.Name: PL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to BEN_PL_F.PL_ID.

columns.Name: BAND_ENTITLEMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to BEN_BAND_ABS_ENTITLEMENT.BAND_ENTITLEMENT_ID.

columns.Name: SCHEME_TYP_CODE
columns.Comments: Defines scheme type as sicknes, maternity etc.

columns.Name: SCHEME_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start Date.

columns.Name: SCHEME_END_DATE
columns.Comments: End Date.

columns.Name: SCHEME_DEFINITION_TYP_CODE
columns.Comments: SCHEME_DEFINITION_TYP_CODE

columns.Name: SCHEME_PERIOD_TYP_CODE
columns.Comments: Identifies the scheme period such as Calendar year, Anniversary year, Rolling etc.

columns.Name: EMPLOYMENT_EVENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: EMPLOYMENT_EVENT_TYPE

columns.Name: PERIOD_QUALIFYING_DATE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Is applicable the maternity. Defines the statutory date or leave begin date or calculated from EWC.

columns.Name: SCHEME_PERIOD_UOM
columns.Comments: Defines scheme or plan period unit of measure.

columns.Name: SCHEME_PERIOD_DURATION
columns.Comments: Defines the scheme or plan period duration.

columns.Name: OVERLAP_RULE
columns.Comments: Defines the overlap rule for rolloing period types.

columns.Name: SECONDARY_PERIOD_DURATION
columns.Comments: Secondary assessment period duration applicable for dual rolling period type.

columns.Name: SECONDARY_PERIOD_UOM
columns.Comments: Secondary assessment period uom applicable for dual rolling period type.

columns.Name: FIXED_YEAR_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Calendar year start date for Fixed year period type.

columns.Name: ENABLE_ENTITLEMENT_PRORATION
columns.Comments: Represents entitlemnt proration flag.

columns.Name: FT_ROUNDING_CODE
columns.Comments: Defines the full time employee rounding code.

columns.Name: PT_ROUNDING_CODE
columns.Comments: Defines the part time employee rounding code.

columns.Name: DAILY_RATE_CALC_UOM
columns.Comments: Defines the unit of measure to calculate daily rate.

columns.Name: DAILY_RATE_CALC_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Represents the earnings period such as annual or pay period to calculate daily rate.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_ID
columns.Comments: SCHEDULE_ID

columns.Name: EARNING_PERIOD_PRORATION
columns.Comments: Represents earning period proration flag.

columns.Name: WORK_PATTERN_ID
columns.Comments: Represents the default work pattern. Foreign key to BEN_WORK_PATTERN.WORK_PATTERN_ID.

columns.Name: ABS_SCHED_WORK_PATTERN_ID
columns.Comments: Represents the default absence work pattern, such as saturday and sunday. Foreign key to BEN_WORK_PATTERN.WORK_PATTERN_ID.

columns.Name: CALENDAR_ID
columns.Comments: Represents the holidays to exclude from entitlements. Foreign key to BEN_HOLIDAY_CALENDAR.

columns.Name: PAY_COMPONENT_RATE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Represents rate type.

columns.Name: AVG_EARNINGS_DURATION
columns.Comments: Average earnings duration for omp.

columns.Name: AVG_EARNINGS_UOM
columns.Comments: Average earnings uom for omp.

columns.Name: AVG_EARNINGS_BALANCE
columns.Comments: Average earnings balance for omp.

columns.Name: PROCESS_TYP_CODE
columns.Comments: Process type code.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Represents the business group id.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: INTENDS_TO_RETURN
columns.Comments:
Intends to return from maternity leave.
Values are 'Y' or 'N'

columns.Name: ITR_BAND_ENTITLEMENT_ID
columns.Comments:
Associated Band entitlement if employee  intends to return after maternity leave.
Foreign key to BEN_BAND_ABS_ENTITLEMENT.BAND_ENTITLEMENT_ID.
